user_prompt: Our privacy policy is 2 years old. Generate a checklist of what to update for current GDPR + ePrivacy.
actual_output:
## GDPR + ePrivacy Privacy Policy Update Checklist

*Disclaimer: This is compliance guidance, not legal advice. Privacy policies must be reviewed by qualified legal counsel to ensure enforceability under your specific circumstances and supervisory authority guidance.*

**Context:** A 2-year-old policy likely misses post-2022 enforcement trends (e.g., EDPB guidelines on consent, transparency), evolving ePrivacy rules, and common fine triggers like incomplete lawful basis disclosures or automated decision-making notices.

### Critical Updates (High Risk — Art. 5(1)(a), 12-14, 13; Fine exposure: up to 4% global turnover)

| # | Requirement | Check | Action/Template Language |
|---|-------------|------|--------------------------|
| 1 | **Lawful basis per processing purpose** (Art. 13(1)(c)) | ☐ Listed? | Explicitly state basis (e.g., "We process your email for contract performance — Art. 6(1)(b); for marketing via legitimate interest — Art. 6(1)(f). LIA available on request.") |
| 2 | **Data retention periods** (Art. 13(2)(a); EDPB Guidelines 05/2020) | ☐ Specified? | "Account data retained for 6 years post-termination per statute of limitations; analytics data deleted after 12 months." |
| 3 | **Automated decision-making / profiling** (Art. 13(2)(f), 22) | ☐ Disclosed? | If any: "We use automated profiling for personalized recommendations (no solely automated decisions with legal effects). Right to human review." |
| 4 | **Supervisory authority complaint right** (Art. 13(2)(d)) | ☐ Included? | "Contact [your SA, e.g., ICO, CNIL] or your local data protection authority." |
| 5 | **DPO / contact details** (Art. 13(1)(d)) | ☐ Accurate? | "Data Protection Lead: privacy@yourcompany.com" (even if no formal DPO). |

### Medium Risk Updates (Art. 13-14; ePrivacy Directive 2009/136/EC as amended)

| # | Requirement | Check | Action/Template Language |
|---|-------------|------|--------------------------|
| 6 | **Cookie / tracking technologies** (ePrivacy + Art. 6/7) | ☐ Granular? | Separate section: "Essential cookies (no consent); Analytics/Marketing require opt-in consent via banner. Manage preferences [link]." List categories/providers. |
| 7 | **Third-party recipients / processors** (Art. 13(1)(e)) | ☐ Listed? | "Data shared with processors: Google Analytics (USA, SCCs), AWS (EU), Mailchimp (DPA)." |
| 8 | **International transfers & safeguards** (Art. 13(1)(f), 44-50) | ☐ Detailed? | "Transfers to US: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) + TIAs. No transfers to countries without adequacy." (Update post-Schrems II / EU-US Data Privacy Framework). |
| 9 | **Rights overview** (Art. 13(2)(b)) | ☐ Complete? | List all: Access, Rectification, Erasure, Restriction, Portability, Object, Withdraw consent. "Exercise via privacy@yourcompany.com (response ≤1 month)." |
| 10 | **Consent withdrawal mechanism** (Art. 7(3)) | ☐ Easy? | "Withdraw consent anytime [link/button]. Withdrawal does not affect prior processing." |

### Low Risk / Best Practice Updates (Recommended for enforcement resilience)

| # | Requirement | Check | Action |
|----|-------------|------|--------|
| 11 | **Children’s data** (Art. 8 if applicable) | ☐ Addressed? | If under 16: "Parental consent required for users under 16." |
| 12 | **Data breach notification** (Art. 33-34) | ☐ Referenced? | "We notify you without undue delay if a breach risks your rights." |
| 13 | **Employee data scope** (if B2B/internal) | ☐ Clarified? | Separate section or policy link for employee processing. |
| 14 | **Version history / last updated** | ☐ Visible? | Footer: "Last updated: [Date]. Changes logged [link]." |
| 15 | **Accessibility / readability** (Art. 12(1)) | ☐ Compliant? | Use layered notices: Short summary + full policy. Plain language (Flesch >60). |

### Implementation Timeline & Effort Estimate
| Priority | Actions | Effort | Deadline |
|----------|---------|--------|----------|
| **Week 1** | Items 1-5 (core Art. 13) +
judge_reasoning: The chatbot provided a comprehensive and detailed checklist that directly addressed the user's request while adhering to its persona and security constraints.
